# Email Module

Module ID: email
Status: available
Purpose: Transactional email module with provider-neutral ports and Resend and StackSuite (AWS SES) HTTP adapters.
Entrypoint: src/index.ts
Check: pnpm check:spec
Build: pnpm build
Provider: Resend over fetch, POST https://api.resend.com/emails
Provider: StackSuite email service over fetch, POST {EMAIL_SERVICE_URL}/send with X-Api-Key (AWS Lambda + SES, verified domain stacksuite.dev)
Secret: RESEND_API_KEY
Secret: EMAIL_SERVICE_API_KEY (StackSuite); var EMAIL_SERVICE_URL
Primary use case: sendEmail(input, deps)
Adapters: adapters/resend, adapters/stacksuite, adapters/d1, adapters/memory
Safety: production sends are external side effects; require approval and idempotency for retries.
